title: agropyron repens var. nemorale
intro: Agropyron repens var. nemorale, also known as creeping meadow grass, is a type of perennial grass that belongs to the Poaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can be used to treat wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of Agropyron repens var. nemorale include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems. The plant can be prepared in various herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
